title: Plugins
content:
### Official Plugins Tailwind provides official plugins for common patterns: ```bash npm install @tailwindcss/typography @tailwindcss/forms @tailwindcss/aspect-ratio @tailwindcss/container-queries ``` Add to config: ```js module.exports = { plugins: [ require('@tailwindcss/typography'), require('@tailwindcss/forms'), require('@tailwindcss/aspect-ratio'), require('@tailwindcss/container-queries'), ], } ``` ### @tailwindcss/typography (Prose) Adds beautiful typographic defaults for rich text content: ```html

Article Title

This will be styled with beautiful typography defaults.

A styled blockquote.
  • List items
  • With proper spacing
``` Variants: `prose-sm`, `prose-lg`, `prose-xl`, `prose-2xl` Color modifiers: `prose-blue`, `prose-gray`, `prose-slate` Dark mode: `
` ### @tailwindcss/forms Resets form elements for easier styling: ```html

What function is used to create custom utilities in a plugin?
